gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用幽默与深情穿越生死，让语音留言成为最意外的浪漫信使。
gems.whyWatchEn: A hilarious and heartfelt twist on grief and connection, where voicemails meant for the dead spark an unexpected long-distance romance.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松治愈、笑中带泪爱情故事的观众；对现代通讯式浪漫感兴趣的人。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted yet emotional romances; viewers intrigued by digitally mediated love stories.

gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
